# Foundry (SaaS Maker)

> Sarthak Agrawal's personal product fleet showcase — shipped apps plus the open-source operating layer that runs them.

## Product

- [Home](https://sassmaker.com/): Fleet map
- [Docs](https://docs.sassmaker.com): Foundry manual
- [Cockpit](https://app.sassmaker.com): Operator dashboard (auth)

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://sassmaker.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://sassmaker.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://sassmaker.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
